name: Denmark-Identity-Infrastructure Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Reduced dependency on Apple/Google → Systemic: Improved digital sovereignty → Strategic: Enhanced resilience and continuity of service.
options: Consolidate public services under a single platform-neutral entity
Implement open standards for authentication and authorization
Develop a decentralized, blockchain-based identity management system
review: Controls dependency on foreign technology suppliers vs. Ensuring platform neutrality. Weakness: The options fail to consider the impact of incumbent resistance from existing operators.

name: Denmark-Procurement-Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Altered procurement processes → Systemic: Increased supplier diversity → Strategic: Reduced risk of supplier concentration.
options: Develop a tendering process that prioritizes platform-neutral solutions
Establish a certification program for identity management systems
Create a public-private partnership to develop and implement new identity infrastructure
review: Controls procurement processes vs. Ensuring supplier diversity. Weakness: The options fail to consider the impact of financing uncertainty on project implementation.
